column2: Single cell transcriptome analysis identified a unique neutrophil type associated with Alzheimer's disease (Zhang, et. al, Immune 2024; all cell types)

This study used scRNAseq to profil the neutrophil population isolated from 7-month-old APP/PS1 transgenic mouse PBMCs by flow cytometery; compared different clusters of neutrophil transcriptomic features and identified Neu-5 cluster 5 as the cluster that has close correlation with high migratory capacity and pathological AD manifestations; data can be accessed from NCBI GEO: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE255662
processed code is availble at https://github.com/Zhangxiaolin0/AD-neutrophil-scRNA-seq/; the integrated seurat object used in the nemoize function is provided by the auther : [Zhang_immune_2024_AD_neutrophil] This dataset contains 16708 columns/cells/samples, and 17527 rows/genes/features.
Shanghai Jiaotong University School of Medicine
